name: claude-factory
description: The Claude-Factory dark software factory — deterministic orchestration kernel driving LLM agents through a six-phase product process (discovery, event modeling, architecture, design system, TDD development, review).

plugins.name: claude-factory
plugins.description: The factory conductor plugin. Provides the /claude-factory:work loop, phase commands, methodology skills, and the cfk MCP kernel server.

plugins.name: emc
plugins.description: Event Model Compiler plugin. Provides the emc MCP server for authoring and formally verifying event models using Lean4 and Quint.
